0.q: The results show that the overexpression of PsnNAC090 improves the ability to scavenge ROS, increases the accumulation of proline and maintains the stability of cell membrane structure, thus enhancing the stress tolerance of transgenic plants.

1.q: transgenic tobacco overexpressing PsnMYB30 exhibited higher levels of SOD, POD, proline, and chlorophyll content, and significantly lower MDA and H2O2 content than the WT.

2.q: the suppression of PsnWRKY70 can slow down the P n decline of P. simonii × P. nigra under salt stress and maintain better photosynthesis ability.

3.q: Yeast two-hybrid assay and transcriptome analysis revealed that HP1, RRM, Ulp1 and some mitogen-activated protein kinase cascade members probably interact with PsnWRKY70 TF to response to salt stress.

5.q: Yeast one-hybrid assay suggested the upstream regulators, PsnWRKY70, PsnNAM, PsnMYB and PsnGT1, probably modulate the expression of the PsnWRKY70 gene by specifically binding to the W-box or GT1GMSCAM4 (GT1) element.

6.q: Yeast one-hybrid assay suggested the upstream regulators, PsnWRKY70, PsnNAM, PsnMYB and PsnGT1, probably modulate the expression of the PsnWRKY70 gene by specifically binding to the W-box or GT1GMSCAM4 (GT1) element.

8.q: overexpression of ERF76 in transgenic poplar upregulated the expression of stress-related genes and increased the ability of ABA and GA biosynthesis
